Thexian Loop  
 

No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 5
Haste: +21%
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Thexian Loop
No Trade
Slot: EAR
AC: 5
Haste: +21%
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Replica of earring worn by Royal Guard
Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tulene - Riders of Kunark
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:09:11
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 1
[Comments ]

Item Lore: Replica of earring worn by Royal Guard

Given out in a GM event.



Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
updated
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 3:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775906947
1 post
In last patch the haste on this was upgraded to Haste: 21%
▲ Page top
1% is WAY off
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 2:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761123489
15 posts
I got this earring about a year ago when I was playing a warrior, and it was for the event where we summoned Tunare in Lfay and Cazic Thule showed and cursed Equestrielle's horn. Firiona had to cut off the horn and now Eques is no longer a nice unicorn. I also got the name Matrumlus the Earth Keeper, which I should have said "no" to when asked if I wanted to keep it as I get tells constantly asking if I am a GM or how I got the name. Anyway, at the time this item was awesome and having had a cloak of flame as well I must say that the haste on this was substantially faster. Now they have added even more haste to this thing as of today's patch, and I don't even play this char anymore. Damn shame its no drop as I could prob sell for a TON. I play a bard now and while this would be nice for him I dont melee as much and would sell it if I had it. Oh well, maybe someday...

▲ Page top
Haste %
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 8:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765258974
183 posts
The haste percent on this is only 1percent so don't get to excited if you get it
▲ Page top
Thex Loop
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2001 at 4:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754909079
1 post
A buddy of mine (DE cleric) was in Neriak banking when he say a GM event going on. I said heck I will be right there (I am a HE enchanter). So I zone put on my DE suit and proceed to watch the event. The DE cleric starts getting into and doing an awesome job of RP. Me trying to think how a HE Agnostic would treat this began looking for ways to make it hard on the participants by suggesting things for the GM but in charater. Long story short I got drafted by servants of INNY to help with a mission. We finished the mission (my participation was minimal) with the DE cleric doing an excellent job. He was rewarded with a title and an awesome weapon. I got the Thex loop. BTW did I mention we were rewarded with an audience with the Prince of Hate himself!

Zimlar Enchanter of the prexus server
▲ Page top
Need a new system for handing out items
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 1:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756303777
4 posts
I did a GM event on E-Marr last night and was lucky enough to receive a coin for my part in event. How excited was I? I went to the OT outpost and turned it in. WHat did I get as a 53 necro? This item. What a waste of an item. Ill use it 3 times a week when i need to use my OT hammer to speed up the proc. Before anyone ******* at me for complaining about receiving a free item, dont do it. I would rather have given this item to one of the melee'ers who did event but instead it has to sit in my bank because I wont use and the GMs wouldnt replace it or give it to another player in event. What a waste.

Kazdeen
▲ Page top
Haste Effect
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 8:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was lucky enough to be in the right place, doing the right thing, at the right time, and I got one of these. Curious thing is it doesn't make me any faster. I've timed it, and whatever I come up with is insanely low (last time it was 2%) or just so small it can be attributed to human error. It's probably my level (I'm 28 at this time, almost 29) but it'd be very strange if they decided to give me something that would never actually do anything. Anyone know if there's a level at which this starts activating?
▲ Page top
RE: Haste Effect
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 8:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Forgot to mention this:
One of my guildmates told me it's 40%... insane! I'm not sure if this is right, but if it is... man...
As a secondary note, this and other items are gotten (along with insane exp for my level) from coins given out at the end of an event. The Thexian Loop is from the Coin of Gallantry, if I remember correctly.

Danedil Stormforge
Guardians of Light
Saryrn
▲ Page top
Thexian Loop
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 4:25 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I recently received ( about 2 months ago.. I posted it on everlore) a Thexian Loop. At the time I was a level 31 Monk. On Xev Server, as part of a GM event, I assisted in the delivery of an item from Qeynos Hills to the Wizzie spires in NK and everyone in the group received a coin. I took my coin to an NPC in Qeynos and recieved the loop. I havent taken it off since...... I dont know how to figure out what the percentage haste is, so if anyone knows, I would be grateful to learn how. 2nd, How do you trigger it? I tried right-clicking on it, but no message, no graphic, no sparklies, nothing. Makes me think that it is a continuous effect...... Any more infr from other owners is appreciated....

Aenea Endymion
Currently 39 season Monk
of The Enchanted Circle on Xev
▲ Page top
RE: Thexian Loop
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2001 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763878907
258 posts
I'm not sure, but from what I've read, all haste items are permanent. I think whoever put triggered up there made a boo-boo. Don't put money on it though, I haven't even owned a haste item yet :-).
▲ Page top
RE: Thexian Loop

16 posts
Eyepatch of plunder's effect is haste and it is a spell effect.

the post says the hast eis triggered...like a spwll so it will prob stack with any haste item you haev on you

▲ Page top
GM event attainable
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 2:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
For those of you asking how this item is received, it's for GM events only.

I remember monk posting that after a battle with a few minions of the faceless assaulting Fironia Vie in L. Fay, the monk was summoned to the king and given a reward for helping out F. Vie. The monk had to take the item given to him by the king to a local merchant. The monk received this exact earring from the merchant. Supposedly it was an item *that was appropriate for the level and class* of that character. I am not sure what level he was though. Possibly 29 but that's just a guess.


My 2cp worth.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 23 2001 at 2:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why are you all babbling about an item that u will never and cant ever get?
Awesome
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 9:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754040756
10 posts
If you think about it, the ear slots, especially for melee, are tipacally filled by a 2ac-5ac earing. So this is on the high end for AC, but OMFG haste? That's insane. for those who where a haste cloak or belt this would allow you to wear anything else you'd want(assuming its a similar haste). Imagine being able to drop you FBSS and throw on a TBB and take off that cougar claw earing.
▲ Page top
Frees up waist

Heh, and just think, it would free up your waist for a good AC item there instead of wearing an FBSS
